title: Canopy Growth (CGC) Stock Forecast & Analyst Price Targets
text: Stock Analysis provides comprehensive forecast and analyst price target data for CGC. 12-month average price target: $1.40 with range from $1.02 to $1.80. Analyst consensus rating: Moderate Buy based on 2 buy ratings and 2 hold ratings. Upside potential estimated at 22.72% based on average analyst price target. Street-high target of $5.84 suggests potential gains up to 386.67% for optimistic scenarios. Various analyst scenarios reflect different assumptions on path to profitability and market dynamics. Price target distribution shows consensus near $1.40 level with outliers on upside. Revenue growth forecast shows expected stabilization and modest growth in coming years.
